data.name: Sweet Zodiac 2
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Zodiac 2 - 一款以十二生肖為題的簡單唯美的拼圖遊戲，以馬、羊、猴、雞、狗、豬六個生肖的動物擬人化，有輕鬆音樂伴奏，完成關卡後便可以在畫廊中欣賞女孩的照片。

- 遊戲有三個難度 2x2、2x4、4x4 難度的拼圖

- 於拼圖時按"F"鍵開啟黑白圖

- 玩家在遊戲過程中按下 '空白' 鍵即可完成拼圖。

- 玩家可在畫廊中按AD鍵,左右鍵或滑鼠左右鍵快速觀賞女孩圖片

* 拼圖圖片大小為 800x960 px

* 畫廊圖片大小為 1088x960 px

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 32/64 bit Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Zodiac 2
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Zodiac 2 - A simple and beautiful puzzle game based on the twelve zodiac signs. It is personified by animals of the six zodiac signs: horse, sheep, monkey, chicken, dog, and pig. It has relaxing music accompaniment. After completing the level, you can Admire pictures of girls in the gallery.

- The game has three difficulty puzzles: 2x2, 2x4 and 4x4.

- Press the "F" key to open the black and white image during puzzle

- Players can complete the puzzle by pressing the 'space' key during the game.

- Players can press the AD key, left and right keys or mouse left and right keys to quickly view girl pictures in the gallery

*Puzzle image size is 800x960 px

* Gallery image size is 1088x960 px
